chunks.title: Anointing of Jehu
chunks.reason: The prophet sends a young man to Ramoth-gilead to anoint Jehu as king, followed by the soldiers' immediate acceptance.

chunks.title: Death of Joram and Ahaziah
chunks.reason: Jehu travels to Jezreel, confronts King Joram, kills him, and pursues King Ahaziah who flees to Megiddo.

chunks.title: Death of Jezebel
chunks.reason: Jehu arrives at Jezreel, Jezebel is thrown from the window, and her body is found partially eaten by dogs.
